common.error.backendUnavailable: Backend unavailable or configuration is incorrect.
common.error.timeout: The API took too long to respond. Please try again shortly.
common.error.rateLimit: Too many attempts in a row. Please wait a moment before trying again.
common.error.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
topbar.title: Digital hygiene, exposure and privacy
topbar.language.label: Language
hero.title: See exposure, understand risk and act clearly.
hero.text: I-safe brings together email exposure checks, image privacy and secure authentication in a direct, trustworthy interface prepared for real use.
hero.summary.focus.label: Current focus
hero.summary.reading.label: Reading mode
hero.summary.reading.beginner: Direct summary focused on risk and action
hero.summary.operation.label: Operation
hero.summary.operation.value: Real backend, no fake visual mocks or invented data
trust.product.label: Product
trust.usage.label: Recommended use
trust.backend.label: Backend
trust.backend.value: Real FastAPI with authentication and abuse prevention
auth.section.title: Authenticated user
auth.section.description: The refresh token remains protected in an HttpOnly cookie. The frontend only keeps the access token in memory.
auth.demo.title: Local demo access
auth.email.label: Email
auth.password.label: Password
auth.note.cookie: The refresh token is not exposed to JavaScript. The session remains protected in the browser.
auth.note.provisioned: This demo does not offer public sign-up. Login requires a user already provisioned in the backend.
auth.login.error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few moments.
auth.login.error.network: Backend unavailable or configuration is incorrect.
auth.session.expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.
auth.session.renewError: Your session could not be renewed safely. Please sign in again.
auth.bootstrap.error: Backend unavailable or configuration is incorrect.
osint.section.title: OSINT check
osint.section.description: Use this module for self-assessment. The real backend reduces detail in restricted responses and keeps phone checks under explicit feature-flag control.
osint.primary.label: Primary
osint.primary.title: Email lookup
osint.primary.description: Best for checking exposure in known leaks and receiving practical response guidance.
osint.email.label: Email to verify
osint.email.hint: Use for self-check. Avoid bulk queries or checks on third parties without a legitimate context.
osint.email.empty.title: Ready to check.
osint.email.empty.body: Enter an email to view risk, related sources and practical response guidance.
osint.email.error: Unable to complete this email verification.
osint.phone.title: Phone lookup
osint.phone.description: Controlled flow for international verification in E.164 format. If the backend is in mock mode or the feature is disabled, this will be shown clearly in the result or returned message.
osint.phone.label: International phone
osint.phone.empty.title: Complementary lookup is idle until used.
osint.phone.empty.body: When enabled in the backend, it follows the same secure and restricted-response principles as email.
osint.phone.error: Unable to complete this phone verification.
osint.result.title: Result
osint.result.summary.restricted: Details were reduced to protect the service and keep the lookup safe.
osint.result.summary.mock: The backend responded in controlled mock mode. Use this only for local validation or technical demos.
osint.result.summary.leaked: There are signs of exposure linked to this identifier.
osint.result.summary.clean: No confirmed leak appeared in this lookup.
osint.result.emptySources.title: No sources listed.
osint.result.emptySources.email: This response did not include platforms associated with this lookup.
osint.result.emptySources.phone: This response did not include datasets or sources related to the queried phone.
osint.result.emptyData.title: No data types listed.
osint.result.emptyData.email: The backend did not return specific exposed data classes for this response.
osint.result.emptyData.phone: The backend did not return specific exposed data classes for this phone.
osint.result.emptyRecommendations.title: No specific recommendations.
osint.result.emptyRecommendations.body: No additional guidance was returned for this lookup.
upload.section.title: Image privacy
upload.section.description: Check metadata, EXIF and location risk before sharing your images.
upload.dropzone.title: Upload image
upload.dropzone.hint: Drag a JPG or PNG image into this area, or click to select one.
upload.empty.title: Upload an image to analyze.
upload.empty.body: The result will show metadata found, privacy alerts and sanitization availability.
upload.error.missingFile: Select a JPG or PNG image to continue.
upload.error.fallback: Unable to verify this image safely.
upload.result.safe: No critical alert was identified in this analysis.
upload.result.warning: This image contains signs of privacy risk.
upload.result.beginner.safe: This image can move forward for sharing with low apparent risk.
upload.result.beginner.warning: Review the alerts before sharing this image.
upload.result.emptyAlerts.title: No critical alerts.
upload.result.emptyAlerts.body: No relevant EXIF or GPS indicator was found in this analysis.
roadmap.title: Next modules
roadmap.description: These blocks exist to communicate product direction. They do not represent active features yet.
backend.dataType.name: name
backend.action.email.mock: [✔] Encrypted data stored in Aegis DB (mock mode).
backend.action.email.success: [✔] Encrypted data stored in Aegis DB.
backend.action.phone.mock: [!] Phone lookup in controlled mock mode.
backend.recommendation.rotate.title: Rotate reused credentials
backend.recommendation.rotate.descriptio: Change exposed passwords, prioritize your primary email and enable 2FA through an authenticator app.
backend.recommendation.recovery.title: Strengthen account recovery channels
backend.recommendation.recovery.descript: Review anti-phishing filters, public aliases and recovery methods linked to the monitored email.
backend.recommendation.phone.title: Reduce SIM swap and vishing risk
backend.recommendation.phone.description: Enable a carrier PIN and two-step verification in messaging apps to reduce social engineering risk.
backend.recommendation.monitor.title: Keep continuous monitoring
backend.recommendation.monitor.descripti: Keep monitoring the queried identifier and periodically review passwords, 2FA and public data exposure.
backend.recommendation.restricted.title: Wait before trying again
backend.recommendation.restricted.descri: The lookup was processed in restricted mode to protect the service against abuse.
backend.privacyAlert.gps: CRITICAL PRIVACY ALERT: This image contains embedded location metadata (active GPS coordinates). Attackers can extract the exact latitude and longitude where this photo was taken. We recommend cleaning metadata or disabling location tagging in your camera app.
backend.detail.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
backend.detail.invalidImage: Unable to validate this image file safely.
backend.detail.invalidMime: Unsupported mimetype. Only JPG and PNG are allowed.
backend.detail.invalidContentType: The file content does not match the declared mimetype.
backend.detail.imageTooLarge: The file exceeds the security limit of {limit}MB.
backend.detail.imageTooManyPixels: The image exceeds the safe resolution limit.
backend.detail.payloadTooLarge: Payload exceeds the allowed security limit.
